matchingDescription: CFD and spread betting platform for leveraged trading on stocks, forex, indices, commodities and crypto. Capital at risk. Suitable for experienced traders comfortable with leveraged products.

variants.text: The Bank for International Settlements estimates global OTC derivatives notional outstanding at $708 trillion. Trading 212 provides retail access to 10,000+ CFD instruments including stocks, forex pairs, commodities and indices, with no minimum deposit. Capital at risk.

The BIS Triennial Survey reports daily forex turnover of $7.5 trillion, making it the world's largest financial market. Trading 212 offers 180+ forex pairs with spreads from 0.8 pips — 76% of retail CFD accounts lose money.

FCA regulations cap retail CFD leverage at 30:1 for major forex pairs and 20:1 for major indices. Trading 212's CFD platform provides real-time margin calculations, automatic stop-loss tools, and negative balance protection for all retail clients.

Academic research shows short sellers identify overvalued stocks an average of 6 months before price corrections materialise (Karpoff & Lou, 2010). Trading 212 CFDs allow short positions on 10,000+ instruments without borrowing shares or a prime broker account.

CFD overnight financing is typically calculated at the benchmark rate plus a spread of 0.5-3%. On a £10,000 long position held 30 days, financing costs approximately £51. Trading 212 publishes all overnight funding rates transparently in-app before positions are opened.
